title: gnaphalium microcephalum subsp. thermale
intro: Gnaphalium microcephalum subsp. thermale, also known as the thermal buttonweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Gnaphalium microcephalum subsp. thermale include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions.
